description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, graphic print of the image of ribs on the back, a yoke at the back with brand logo and branding embroidered on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations If you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better wear than this black t-shirt from adidas. Engineered with technology that wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable throughout, this round neck tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a perfect fit. Pair it with jeans and casual footwear for that cool look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
